title: micromeria nervosa
intro: Micromeria nervosa, also known as the Corsican mint or the Greek mountain tea, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of phenolic compounds and essential oils. The health benefits of Micromeria nervosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Micromeria nervosa, such as tea and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in some traditional recipes.
